concept: Distant / Far Away / Remote in Space
description: Far away in space or time; not close. 'Phaeru' names the quality of remoteness—separation by space, the far that requires journey to reach.
sound_symbolism: The word reaches with awareness. 'Thae' begins with the extended breath of contemplating distance, the mind stretching toward what is far. 'Ru' settles into deep remoteness. Distant as experienced through consciousness, not merely measured.
grammatical_notes: Functions as an adjective: 'thaeru thila' (distant place). Distinct from preposition 'woe' (far/from) which marks spatial relationship. This is the quality of being far.

pillars.secular-buddhist-philosophy: What seems distant may be near—enlightenment is not far, only obscured by confusion.
pillars.pre-industrial-wisdom: Distant places required journey—remoteness meant time, effort, and risk to reach.
